ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "money_line" INTEGER /* Money line for the game */,
  "orig_score_projection" TEXT /* Original score projection */,
  "orig_win_projection" REAL /* Original win projection percentage */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is part of */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface the stadium has (e.g., grass, turf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the bet */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the bet is placed on */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet type (e.g., money line, point spread) */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., won, lost, pending) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the bet was placed */,
  "odds_at_bet_time" REAL /* Odds at the time the bet was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_bet_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_type_id") REFERENCES bet_types ("bet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role (e.g., bettor, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current account balance of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the analytics */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet associated with the analytics */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Prediction accuracy percentage */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment for the bet */,
  "betting_trend" TEXT /* Trend of bets placed on the game (e.g., favorite, underdog) */,
  "game_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the team in the game (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds_history" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the odds */,
  "money_line" INTEGER /* Money line odds for the game */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the odds were recorded */,
  "over_under" REAL /* Over/under odds for the game */,
  "point_spread" REAL /* Point spread odds for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the projection */,
  "score_projection" TEXT /* Projected score for the game */,
  "win_probability" REAL /* Win probability percentage based on projections */,
  "yards_gained_projection" INTEGER /* Projected yards gained by the team */,
  "turnovers_projection" INTEGER /* Projected turnovers committed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., bettor, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view bets, manage users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bet_types" (
  "bet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet type */,
  "bet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bet type (e.g., money line, point spread) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bet type */,
  "min_bet_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount required for the bet type */,
  "max_bet_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount allowed for the bet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the stats */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team whose stats are recorded */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers committed by the team */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the team */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards gained by the team */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the team */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team whose performance is recorded */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the performance */,
  "offense_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team's offense */,
  "defense_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team's defense */,
  "special_teams_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team's special teams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game where the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, sprain) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is part of */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
